# sweb_domain_redirect (Resource)

Manages a domain's redirect URL (setRedirectVh/getRedirectVh on /domains). The domain must already belong to the account. Destroying the resource clears the redirect.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Manage a domain's redirect URL for a domain the account already owns.
# Destroying the resource clears the redirect.
resource "sweb_domain_redirect" "example" {
  domain = "example.com"
  url    = "https://example.org"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `domain` (String) The domain whose redirect is managed. Changing it targets a different domain.
- `url` (String) The URL to redirect the domain to.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Resource id (equals domain).
